Interface IGeometryBag

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that identify a geometry bag.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("B5B8CDA0-9D24-11D3-810D-0080C75E8A71")]
public interface IGeometryBag : IGeometry

esriGeometryDimension Dimension { get; }

IEnvelope Envelope { get; }

IEnvelope

esriGeometryType GeometryType { get; }

Property Value

esriGeometryType

IsEmpty 

bool IsEmpty { get; }

Property Value

bool

LosslessExport

Indicates if this geometry bag exported itself to a shapefile buffer with no loss of information. Currently always returns false.

bool LosslessExport { get; }

Property Value

bool
